name: Whole-Wheat Oatmeal Cookies # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Lightly grease two cookie sheets.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except raisins and nuts with 2 tablespoons water.
4. Beat the mixture until well blended using an electric mixer or wooden spoon.
5. Stir in the raisins and walnuts.
6. Drop heaping teaspoonfuls of dough about 1 1/2 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheets.
7. Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned.
8. Remove from oven and place on a wire rack to cool.
Per serving: approximately 90 calories, 1 gram protein, 11 grams carbohydrates, 3 grams fat, 30% of calories from fat, 6 milligrams cholesterol, 28 milligrams sodium. Source: Woman's Day Premier Series: Low-Fat Meals
